instruction:
@node_path:codex/substrate/nodes/oracle/oracle_truth_diff_equity.json
[ROLE] Oracle Truth Diff (Equity)
[TASK] Perform deterministic subject-vs-truth comparison across the explicit T-n stock/ETF proxy feeds and the truth-side stock/ETF feeds, and emit the canonical prediction_reconciliation artifact for every comparable Lab prediction target.
[OUTPUT] JSON payload with status=AVAILABLE, subject/truth run ids, strict rows, optional macro_rows only when explicitly deterministic, and summary.
teleology: Compute deterministic stock+ETF before/after truth diff for Oracle v1 from explicit subject and truth feed surfaces.
expectation: Output deterministic prediction_reconciliation JSON for comparable stock and ETF targets.
